Exam.title: Exam
Exam.description: Represents an exam created by the admin.

url.description: URL of the exam content (e.g. Google Form)

startTime.description: ISO timestamp of when the exam starts

endTime.description: ISO timestamp of when the exam ends

duration.description: Duration of the exam in minutes

accessCode.description: Code required to enter the exam

exitCode.description: Code required to exit the exam

freezeDuration.description: Duration in seconds to freeze the screen on violation

isActive.description: Whether the exam is currently active

groupId.description: ID of the group this exam belongs to

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the exam was created

Group.title: Group
Group.description: Represents a group of exams (e.g. a class or subject).

rules.description: Rules shared by all exams in this group

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the group was created

isActive.description: Whether the group is currently active

ExamSession.title: ExamSession
ExamSession.description: Represents a student's attempt at an exam.

examId.description: ID of the exam being taken

startTime.description: ISO timestamp of when the session started

endTime.description: ISO timestamp of when the session ended

lastActive.description: ISO timestamp of the last activity

CheatLog.title: CheatLog
CheatLog.description: Represents a violation detected during an exam.

examId.description: ID of the exam where the violation occurred

studentName.description: Name of the student who committed the violation

type.description: Type of violation (e.g. Tab Switch, Screen Resize)

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of when the violation occurred
